text:
is an original character that appears in the video game Neon Genesis Evangelion: Shinji Ikari Raising Project.

Profile

Technician responsible of the Balthasar. She is in charge of Shinji's mental strengthening program. She also does have a homely side of being gentle and good at cooking.

History

Neon Genesis Evangelion: Shinji Ikari Raising Project

Neon Genesis Evangelion: Shinji Ikari Raising Project manga

Neon Genesis Evangelion: Gakuen Datenroku

In Neon Genesis Evangelion: Gakuen Datenroku, Kaede is one of the nuns in the NERV Academy during the day, but she is actually a NERV member as her real ocupation. Neon Genesis Evangelion: Gakuen Datenroku Volume 3, chapter 12 

Trivia

Her surname, Agano comes from the of the Japanese Imperial Navy.
